name: Pomegranate Ariel
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Ripe papaya, peel & seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pomegranate berries, currants, and almond slivers together.
2. Divide the mixture into 6 portions and put each portion into a glass goblet.
3. Cut the papaya into chunks and place them in a blender.
4. Blend with the orange juice at medium speed until smooth.
5. Pour equal amounts of the blended papaya over the 6 portions of pomegranate mixture.
6. Top each goblet with a date, a lemon slice, and 2 spearmint leaves.
7. Serve immediately. Covered and stored in the refrigerator, this dessert will keep for 3 to 5 days.
